metadata.description: Agent skills for Claude Code, Cursor, and VS Code (Copilot)

plugins.name: skills4sh
plugins.description: Agent skills: agent-memory (persistent project memory), code-to-figma (CI-anchored code → Figma token export pipeline), discord-harvest (Discord content extraction), eleventy-nunjucks (11ty + Nunjucks conventions), figma-to-code (repo-first Figma MCP implementation, tokens, rules, and Code Connect), localhost-screenshots (responsive screenshot capture)
